title: USWDS+ Component Manifest
description: Canonical, hand-authored contract for one component. Lives beside tokenTemplate.ts / tokenSchema.ts / styles.scss. Validated against code by lint-manifest; consumed by the Figma bridge, the Claude Design skill, docs, editor support, and CMS integrations.

key.description: Module + token group key. Must match the module's tokenTemplate export.

description.description: What this component IS, in one or two sentences. Written for both humans and the Claude Design skill.

nativeElement.description: The semantic HTML element at the component's core, e.g. 'button', 'dialog'.

role.description: Required ARIA role, if the native element doesn't supply it.

guidance.description: Usage rules a design tool or AI must respect ('never use for navigation').

webComponent.description: Omit entirely for modules with no web component yet. The lint cross-checks every field against the element source; a standard custom-elements.json is generated from this section.

values.description: Required when type is 'enum'. Must match the .types.ts union.

classMap.description: enum value -> CSS class applied (null = no class). Must match the element's class map.

requiredWhen.description: Condition under which this attribute becomes required, e.g. 'icon-only'.

a11y.description: True when the attribute exists for accessibility.

states.description: Interactive states the component styles. Tokens follow the '<token>-<state>' convention for each.

variants.description: Keyed by variant value (must be a subset of webComponent.attributes.variant.values when present). tokenPrefix declares the convention: tokens for this variant are '<tokenPrefix>-*' keys in the token template. null = variant restyles via existing default tokens only.

group.description: Token template key this component draws from. Must equal an existing tokenTemplate export (usually = key).

forwarded.description: ARIA attributes the web component forwards to the native element.

rules.description: Hard requirements ('icon-only requires an accessible name').

additionalProperties.description: Either '@attributes.<name>' to mirror an attribute enum (linted for equality), or an explicit value list for Figma-only axes like 'state'.

attribute.description: Web-component attribute this Figma property round-trips to.

anatomy.description: Ordered Figma layer names for MCP generation.
